item.title: MikeGarafolo: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 19min From @gmfb : The #Giants and Dexter Lawrence are at an “imp
item.description: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 19min From @gmfb : The #Giants and Dexter Lawrence are at an “impasse,” as @RapSheet reported. It’s a standoff, with Lawrence putting on the pressure while the team holds firm on his deal that has two years remaining. 7 21 99 90 mil

item.title: RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 18min Good breakdown. Cita Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 19min From @gmfb: The #Giants and Dext
item.description: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 18min Good breakdown. Cita Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 19min From @gmfb: The #Giants and Dexter Lawrence are at an “impasse,” as @RapSheet reported. It’s a standoff, with Lawrence putting on the pressure while the team holds firm on his deal that has two years remaining. 12 8 119 76 mil
